title: Advanced Pricing & Rule Engine
summary: Released smarter quantity and value rules for B2B checkout workflows.
highlights: Set min/max quantity by product and variant

title: Bundle Quantity Enhancements
summary: Expanded bundle logic with easier setup and better storefront compatibility.

title: Mobile Bulk Ordering Refresh
summary: Redesigned mobile interactions for speed and cleaner quantity input handling.
highlights: Larger touch targets on quantity controls

title: Cart Restrictions 2.0
summary: Introduced deeper cart validation controls for wholesale merchants.
highlights: Safer handling for mixed variant carts

title: UX & Performance Optimization
summary: General app speed and table rendering improvements across storefront themes.
highlights: Faster initial load for large variant tables
Reduced script overhead in theme editor
More stable behavior with third-party apps

title: Fractional Quantity Support
summary: Enabled decimal quantity ordering for merchants selling measured goods.

title: Variant Layout Customizer
summary: Launched new layout presets to better match diverse catalog structures.

title: Incremental Quantity Controls
summary: Added step-based quantity increments for pack-size and wholesale use cases.

title: Support Workflow Upgrade
summary: Improved issue resolution flow with faster merchant response handling.

title: Theme Compatibility Expansion
summary: Expanded compatibility across modern Shopify themes and page builders.
highlights: Improved support for dynamic product sections
Reduced style conflicts with theme CSS

title: Mix & Match Ordering Experience
summary: Released guided bundle-building for customers ordering multiple variants together.
highlights: Improved checkout completion for wholesale buyers
